textByHash.782fa39a5406af96253e85dfa9cd825453d5ecd9: Like, the War Room and stuff like that, dude. Wicked stuff. Too bad only 'the man' gets to go through.
textByHash.7eae9b0bb3fe582d1f2e9364a7ec3f290537c6f2: Dude, we are bards. We sing of the glories of the common penguin. We are also supposed to record history, but man, it is so HIS story. Like, the MAN's story.
textByHash.2b871b9a5f1d9cb81b05cd9393680a25f178de0b: Totally, dude. You want to hear one of our songs?
textByHash.f574bd8d7839857401dfaf32a68ea3013edf3328: But dude, I was reading, and there are instruments we could play. I read about one called bongos. They just need to be hit.
textByHash.d000b5a214dbe044d0963815c3eb1a25ab557c5e: Wait, wait. It needs more cowbell.
textByHash.7ba4c9abcf0bf37b95bbd774bba21d7eb0a1bf6b: Our Pescallion went exploring and found this iceberg
textByHash.35d93b386008be6fcf163582d35a26d510d7ce75: Upon an iceberg he came, and our lives were never the same.
textByHash.4e9fc199e68454abb07cc7196bcc664cb2307a4d: To grow and learn, though our hearts did yearn...
textByHash.635c4c2f4b0c30e674dcdcf85888dd9dcf7f01a1: Deep inside the 'berg lay a threat, but don't fret!
